summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of new Cohort feature. 22/22 backend pytest tests pass. Public /cohort page, discovery-call modal end-to-end, and admin Cohort sidebar with Cohort Programs / Cohort Groups (legacy) tabs and 3 sub-tabs (Cohorts/Enrollments/Discovery Calls) all work correctly. Razorpay create-order returns correct shape and totals (25000 base, 4500 GST, 29500 total = 2950000 paise).

ui_bugs.issue: Form inputs lack name/data-testid attributes — required fallback to xpath label-following selectors. Tests still pass but recommend adding data-testid (discovery-name-input, discovery-email-input, discovery-phone-input, discovery-preferred-time-input, discovery-message-input, discovery-submit-btn) and name attributes for accessibility.

action_items: Optional: add data-testid + name attributes to discovery-call modal inputs in /app/frontend/src/pages/Cohort.jsx for more robust automated testing.

Note: there is a leftover soft-deleted seeded cohort named 'Case Interview Sprint' with empty slug '/cohort/' (0 weeks, 0 sessions, ARCHIVED) showing in admin list — likely from earlier seed, not a code bug, but admin may want to hard-delete it.
critical_code_review_comments: cohorts.py line 599: hard-delete query-param parsing is non-standard (pulls from request.query_params) — works, but FastAPI Query() pattern would be cleaner.

cohorts.py 376-385: signature-mismatch fallback to razorpay_client.payment.fetch can raise broad Exception which is then converted to 'signature mismatch' — fine but masks real Razorpay errors in logs. Not blocking.
Cohort model in cohorts.py exposes admin-only fields like is_featured/is_active in PUT body; trusting admin to set correctly is OK but worth a follow-up to use a separate AdminCohortUpdate model.
Frontend discovery modal: no data-testid attributes; relies on label-text selectors.
test_credentials: Used POST /api/auth/mock-login?user_type=admin and ?user_type=subscription (no 'candidate' user_type in mock — 'subscription' satisfies non-admin candidate role).
seed_data_creation: test_cohort_programs.py module creates a TEST_Cohort_<uuid> via admin endpoint, runs 22 tests against it, then hard-deletes it on teardown. Seeded 'Case Interview Sprint' (slug=case-interview-sprint) used by admin UI test was already in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 22 backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_cohort_programs.py pass against current REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Cohort feature is production-ready. Razorpay verify endpoint signature path was not exercised end-to-end (would need real test signature) but create-order shape, idempotency idle path, and admin lifecycle were fully tested. The discovery modal works end-to-end and was verified UI-side (Request received success state confirmed).
